reference: I was trying to refill one of those weed killer containers because it had pressure in it, and it was difficult to unscrew. I felt a pop on the right side under my breast. It hurts to bend over, and I have a little trouble breathing. I want to know if I pulled a muscle, fractured a rib, or something.
